name: On Board — Cross-Platform Agent Shared Memory MCP
description: On Board is a local-first MCP server for multi-agent project coordination. It gives Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and AntiGravity one shared project memory, a ticket queue, and a review gate backed by plain files in .agent-mem/.
author: swisspra

tools.name: memory_onboard
tools.description: Join an agent session and receive the project briefing in one call.

tools.name: memory_agent_join
tools.description: Register or rejoin an active agent session.

tools.name: memory_get_briefing
tools.description: Read project context, recent memory, handoffs, and open work.

tools.name: memory_handoff
tools.description: Write a structured handoff before ending an agent session.

tools.name: memory_checkpoint
tools.description: Save mid-work state, blockers, branch, and remaining tasks.

tools.name: memory_write
tools.description: Write durable project memory stamped with agent identity.

tools.name: memory_read
tools.description: Read recent memory with filters for type, tag, agent, and time window.

tools.name: memory_search
tools.description: Search active memory with ranked keyword matching.

tools.name: memory_search_vector
tools.description: Run local vector-style memory search.

tools.name: memory_links
tools.description: Show links between memories, tickets, files, and agents.

tools.name: memory_pin
tools.description: Pin or unpin important memory entries.

tools.name: memory_create_ticket
tools.description: Create a cross-agent work ticket with target URL, scope, and required artifacts.

tools.name: memory_claim_ticket
tools.description: Claim a ticket so parallel agents do not duplicate work.

tools.name: memory_submit_ticket
tools.description: Submit ticket work for review with summary and changed files.

tools.name: memory_review_ticket
tools.description: Approve or reject submitted ticket work with concrete review notes.

tools.name: memory_list_tickets
tools.description: List open, assigned, submitted, closed, or rejected tickets.

tools.name: memory_cancel_ticket
tools.description: Cancel a ticket that should no longer be done.

tools.name: memory_terminate_ticket
tools.description: Force-terminate a ticket when normal workflow cannot continue.

tools.name: memory_init
tools.description: Initialize .agent-mem/ for a new project.

tools.name: memory_bootstrap
tools.description: Bootstrap memory for an existing project by scanning common project files.

tools.name: memory_status
tools.description: Show project, agent, memory, and ticket status.

tools.name: memory_doctor
tools.description: Check project setup and memory data integrity.

tools.name: memory_update_state
tools.description: Update small shared project state values.

tools.name: memory_context_dirs
tools.description: List external context directories from AGENT_MEM_CONTEXT_DIRS.

tools.name: memory_context_read
tools.description: Read files from configured external context directories.

tools.name: memory_prepare_compaction
tools.description: Preview old memory entries before compaction.

tools.name: memory_compact
tools.description: Archive older memory entries after a digest exists.

tools.name: memory_token_usage
tools.description: Estimate memory and briefing token usage.

tools.name: memory_search_archive
tools.description: Search archived memory after compaction.

prompts.name: on-board
prompts.description: Join the project and get the full briefing; run this first.
